{{Infobox group
| name = Avernus Travelers
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Avernus Travelers Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] [[Travelers]] are individuals belonging to the [[Avernus]] [[Territory]], a realm characterized by massive forests and an abundance of birds. These [[Travelers]] are often associated with avian creatures, such as ravens or large white eagles, which they can summon through specific methods like blowing on a feather. They possess unique abilities that allow them to bond deeply with these flocks and utilize them for transport or combat. While some [[Travelers]] rely heavily on their powers, certain [[Avernus]] individuals are noted for being practically prepared for physical confrontation. In terms of social structure, [[Avernus]] [[Travelers]] tend to organize themselves through tribal affiliations rather than national loyalties. They are led by a Grandmaster, such as the current leader [[Avernus]], and may also be influenced by [[Incarnations]]. Navigating through the [[Avernus]] [[Territory]] can be difficult and time-consuming, making precise movement a challenge. Additionally, some [[Travelers]] possess emergency measures that allow them to travel directly back to their home lands, though this can be unpredictable. The community is often described as seeking true connection and loyalty among its members.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Avernus Travelers]] is a group that includes [[Ezera]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Avernus Travelers]] ride on huge white eagles.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Avernus]] [[Travelers]] are women characterized by their brown buckskin clothing and the feathers worn in their hair. During a nearby battle, these travelers surrounded [[Kai]], though most of the group perished once the fighting concluded. Due to their connections among the [[Sarin]], they serve as highly effective spies. One such traveler eventually provided [[Leah]] with a report stating that [[Bel Calem]] was engulfed in flames.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]] is a woman wearing brown buckskin clothing and feathers in her hair.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Avernus Travelers]] wear buckskin outfits and use feathers.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Avernus Travelers]] surround [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Most of the [[Avernus Travelers]] were dead after the battle.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Avernus Travelers]] are in a battle nearby.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Avernus Travelers]] with contacts among the [[Sarin]] make excellent spies.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]] reported that [[Bel Calem]] is in flames to [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Avernus]] [[Travelers]] are a specific classification of traveler who share a unique bond with their birds. Within this group, Feiora works toward the goal of unifying all members. Some individuals from this collective served as borrowed personnel for [[Cana]], often appearing in armored black outfits. Despite their capabilities, these travelers may struggle with an arrogant reliance on their innate powers.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|An [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]] is a type of traveler.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora seeks to unify the [[Avernus Travelers]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Some of the personnel borrowed from [[Cana]] were [[Avernus Travelers]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus Travelers]] may suffer from an arrogant reliance on their powers.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The narrator is not an [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]] wears an armored black outfit.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus Travelers]] share a bond with their birds.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Is it?” Kai said, looking around at the Avernus Travelers surrounding him.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An Avernus Traveler poked her head into Leah’s tent. “That’s a report from Bel Calem,” she said. “The city is in flames.”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
